title: Lead Frontend Developer at Ola Cabs Global Group

jsonLd.title: Lead Frontend Developer at Ola Cabs Global Group
jsonLd.description:
Ola Cabs Global Group has an exciting opening for a Frontend Developer at our Rajkot office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Ola Cabs Global Group:
Ola Cabs Global Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in AWS

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Referral bonus program
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ola Cabs Global Group!
